title: Smoky Roasted Indian Sugar Snap Pea Stir-Fry
description: A floral, dense, light Indian dish featuring sugar snap peas with a smoky touch, perfect for a quick and easy dinner that's kosher-friendly.

ingredients.name: 1 lb Sugar Snap Peas
ingredients.notes: Freshly picked for best flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: Light olive oil to enhance flavors without adding heavy richness.

ingredients.name: Pinch of Salt
ingredients.notes: For a touch of umami and balance.

ingredients.name: 1/4 tsp Ground Cumin
ingredients.notes: Adds a warm, earthy flavor to the dish.

ingredients.name: 2 cloves Garlic, minced
ingredients.notes: Gives depth with its natural pungency.

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 Lime
ingredients.notes: Citrus tang to cut through the richness of other ingredients.

ingredients.name: 1/4 tsp Ground Cinnamon
ingredients.notes: For a subtle warmth and depth in the dish.

ingredients.name: Pinch of Cayenne Pepper
ingredients.notes: A touch of heat to balance out other ingredients, not too spicy for everyone's palate.

instructions: Preheat your oven to 400°F (205°C). Rinse and trim the sugar snap peas.
Toss the sugar snap peas with olive oil, salt, cumin, garlic, lime juice, cinnamon, and cayenne pepper in a mixing bowl until well-coated.
Spread the coated sugar snap peas evenly on a baking sheet. Roast for about 15-20 minutes or until tender and lightly crispy around the edges.
Serve hot as a side dish with any Indian-inspired main course like dal, roti, or chutney.
